docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHANGING-PLACES AS TO DEFENDANT GAEDE, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED NOV-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAEDE, WILLIAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANGING-PLACES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY CHANGING-PLACES GAEDE, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGARET F. WALSH--OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANGING-PLACES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAEDE, WILLIAM $2,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,975.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM OF $5,000 IS OFFSET BY DAMAGES ESTIMATE FROM CITISCAPE, LLC--LANDLORD FOR (A) BASEBOARD COSTS OF $1,900 AND (B) MIRROR LABOR COSTS ONLY OF $225. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GAEDE, WILLIAM
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
